title: Smoky Peruvian Oat Bowl
description: A fusion of Chinese and Peruvian flavors, this smoky oat bowl is a hearty and filling breakfast option.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, smoked paprika, and aji amarillo pepper.
Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper. Grill or pan-fry the chicken until cooked through.
In a separate bowl, mix together cooked oats, sliced scallions, and sesame seeds.
Add the cooked chicken on top of the oat mixture.
Drizzle the soy sauce mixture over the top.
Heat the coconut oil in a pan and add the chicken for a crispy finish.
Serve the smoky Peruvian oat bowl hot, garnished with additional scallions and sesame seeds if desired.
